mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM learning_log WHERE add_datetime >= CURRENT_DATE AND add_datetime < CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day'
SELECT add_datetime::date as date, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as visitorCount FROM learning_log WHERE add_datetime BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY add_datetime::date ORDER BY date

WITH time_diffs AS ( SELECT add_datetime, LAG(add_datetime) OVER (ORDER BY add_datetime) AS prev_datetime FROM learning_log WHERE add_datetime >= EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CURRENT_DATE)::BIGINT AND add_datetime < EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day'))::BIGINT ), valid_sessions AS ( SELECT add_datetime, ABS(add_datetime - prev_datetime) AS diff_seconds FROM time_diffs WHERE prev_datetime IS NOT NULL ) SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) FROM valid_sessions WHERE diff_seconds BETWEEN 55 AND 65
SELECT DATE(add_datetime) as date, SUM(duration_minutes) as totalDuration FROM student_reading_log WHERE add_datetime BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(add_datetime) ORDER BY date
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FROM student_reading_log WHERE add_datetime >= CURRENT_DATE AND add_datetime < CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day'

SELECT DATE(add_datetime) as date, COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) as activeUserCount FROM student_reading_log WHERE add_datetime BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(add_datetime) ORDER BY date
SELECT tc.classification_name as typeName, COUNT(t.id) as textbookCount FROM textbook_classification tc LEFT JOIN textbook t ON tc.id = t.classification GROUP BY tc.id, tc.classification_name

SELECT '学生数量' as resourceName, COUNT(*) as usageCount FROM student UNION ALL SELECT '教材数量' as resourceName, COUNT(*) as usageCount FROM textbook UNION ALL SELECT '题库数量' as resourceName, COUNT(*) as usageCount FROM teaching_question_bank UNION ALL SELECT '教学活动数量' as resourceName, COUNT(*) as usageCount FROM discussion_topic
